report.summary: v12 community cycle: Drafted 4 new tweets (BTC recovery bounce, Morgan Stanley ETF 4-part thread, Tuesday market pulse, quadruple witching aftermath) + Discord/TG late evening update + newsletter v6 addendum #2 for institutional moves. Created 2 social cards: Morgan Stanley ETF (1200x630 SVG with $6.5T AUM, $65B allocation, F&G data panels) and BTC Recovery (1200x630 SVG with price chart visualization and catalyst breakdown). Content calendar v9 now has 20+ posts scheduled Mon-Sun. All links verified live.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet: BTC Recovery Bounce — $68K→$70,600 (+3.8%), Morgan Stanley ETF catalyst, whale accumulation ongoing, links to /tools/whale-tracker (LIVE) — schedule Mon late evening

Thread (4-part): Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF — $6.5T AUM, 1% = $65B, filed during Extreme Fear Day 47, links to /tools/whale-tracker + /tools/fear-greed-timeline + /learn/bitcoin-etf-inflows-march-2026 (ALL LIVE) — schedule Tue early AM
Tweet: Tuesday Morning Market Pulse — recovery data + daily content preview, degen0x.com link — schedule Tue AM
Tweet: Quadruple Witching Aftermath — $5.8T options expiry explains volatility, reduced selling pressure, /tools/whale-tracker (LIVE) — schedule Tue mid-AM
Discord/TG: Late Evening Update — BTC recovery, Morgan Stanley filing, tomorrow's 6-post schedule, tool links
Newsletter v6 addendum #2: Morgan Stanley institutional moves section ($6.5T AUM context + ETF filing + whale data)

CARRIED FROM v11: All 17 previous posts (whale divergence thread, MiCA teaser, DVT teaser, evening recap, Fed fallout, 422 milestone, DCA dip, CLARITY update, whale accumulation, DeFi education, vault strategies, midweek data, engagement poll, CLARITY thread, Discord updates, newsletter v6)

sections.title: Social Visual Cards Created
items: Morgan Stanley ETF card (1200x630 SVG) — Three data panels: $6.5T AUM (green gradient), $65B 1% allocation (amber), F&G 10 (red). Insight bar: 'Smart money files when others flee.' Dark glass-morphism, indigo→cyan→amber gradient accents, BTC $70,600 price tag

BTC Recovery card (1200x630 SVG) — Price chart visualization showing $76K→$68K drop→$70.6K recovery. Four catalyst rows: MS ETF (green), whale accumulation (cyan), exchange supply (amber), F&G (red). Tagline: 'The market punishes patience — until it doesn't.'
CARRIED FROM v11: Whale Divergence Thread card, Fed Wipeout card, DeFi Education card, Whale Accumulation 270K card, CLARITY Act v2 card, Monday Pulse card
